---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits and in what workflow?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible about the user-facing behavior
(keybinding, command, config option, output format, etc.).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links to similar tools, or any other context.
